description_long: This object is a wedge-shaped piece of cheese with a pale, creamy white color and small, scattered yellowish flecks throughout its body, suggesting the presence of herbs or spices. The cheese has a smooth, slightly matte surface with a jagged, uneven top edge, giving it a rustic, hand-cut appearance. Both the front and back faces are broad and flat, while the sides taper to a rounded point, forming a classic wedge profile. There is no visible rind or outer coating, and the cheese appears solid and dense with no large holes or eyes. The texture looks semi-soft, with a slight give if pressed, and the surface is free of any packaging or branding. The cheese is placed against a plain, neutral background with no visible supporting surface.
description: A wedge-shaped, creamy white cheese with yellow flecks and a jagged, hand-cut top edge. The surface is smooth and matte, with no visible rind or packaging.
description_view_0: The broad, flat face of the cheese is visible, showing the jagged top edge and scattered yellow flecks.
description_view_1: A narrow, side profile of the cheese, highlighting its wedge shape and rounded tip.
description_view_2: The opposite broad face, similar to view 0, with the same jagged top and flecked surface.
description_view_3: The other narrow side, showing the wedge's thickness and a slight indentation near the tip.
